annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Idaho Code § 28-22-104(2), currently 8.875% (as of July 1, 2026). Judgment rate = 5% + base rate in effect at time of entry of judgment. Base rate = weekly average yield on U.S. Treasury securities adjusted to a constant maturity of one (1)… Simple interest. § 28-22-104(2) applies "unless the judgment is rendered on a written contract or agreement providing for a different rate of interest, in which case… Verify the current value at sto.idaho.gov; not legal advice.
